title: Bridge Essay: Indoor nature exposure and influence on physiological stress markers.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.

**Indoor nature exposure and influence on physiological stress markers.**. Int J Environ Health Res.. PMID: 31625764. DOI: 10.1080/09603123.2019.1679357. Spending time in nature is beneficial for stress reduction and recovery. Using the properties of biophilic design, this study examined the influence of anature-based indoor environment on physiological stress systems. An experimental study was designed to assess the influence of indoor natural elements on autonomic activity (heart rate variability or HRV), self-reported environmental assessments.
